_comment: Right-click can attack a routing enemy (#975): a player Cavalry unit right-clicks a lone enemy Infantry that spawns ALREADY routing (scenario starting_state 3, morale pinned low so it doesn't instantly rally -- the standard pattern from morale-recovery.json). Before the fix, SelectionManager._unit_at's enemy-team scan only walked the 'units' group -- which a routing unit has left for 'routers' -- so this exact click silently fell through to a ground move at the click point instead of an attack; target_enemy_uid stayed null and the cavalry marched to empty ground beside the router instead of closing on it. After the fix the click resolves the router, target_enemy_uid locks onto it, and the cavalry runs it down and finishes it off (annihilated between t240-260, per a state dump). drill mode (no other enemy). Deterministic (scenario + seed + scripted input); staging verified by state dump before pushing.
